message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "AddressPanel : JPanel" as AddressPanel
participant "ContactsController" as ContactsController
participant "addressFrame: JFrame" as addressFrame
participant "Persistence" as Persistence
participant "RepositoryFactory" as RepositoryFactory
participant "ContactsRepository" as ContactsRepository
participant "BufferedReader" as BufferedReader
participant "FileReader" as FileReader

AddressPanel -> ContactsController: double clicks on the contact to open a window
ContactsController -> addressFrame: new (contact)
addressFrame -> ContactsController: tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)
ContactsController -> BufferedReader: create()
BufferedReader -> FileReader: create(file_name)

loop [while there are lines to read]
  BufferedReader -> BufferedReader: readLine()
end

alt [tmp == true]
  ContactsController -> addressFrame: updateAddress(contact, main_address, secondary_address)
  ContactsController -> RepositoryFactory: getRepositoryFactory()
  RepositoryFactory -> RepositoryFactory: newInstance()
  ContactsController -> ContactsRepository: getContactsRepository()
  ContactsController -> ContactsRepository: update(contact)
end

@enduml
